topics: Exercises on Centre Lathe: Facing, Plain Turning, Step Turning, Taper Turning, Form Turning, Groove Cutting, Knurling, Chamfering, Multi-Start Thread, Square Thread, Internal Thread, and Inspection
Exercises on Milling Machine: Face Milling, End Milling, Spur and Helical Gear Cutting, Milling of Key Ways, T-Slot Cutting, and Inspection
Exercises on Drilling Machine: Drilling, Boring, Reaming, Tapping, and Counter Sinking
Exercises on Shaping Machine/Slotting Machine: Flat Surfaces, Grooves, and Key Ways
Exercises on Grinding Machine: Surface Grinding, Cylindrical Grinding, Tool Grinding, and Inspection
Exercises on Welding: Arc and Gas Welding, Butt Welding, and Lap Welding of M.S. Sheets
Preparation of Program and Exercise on CNC Lathe Including Simulation: Turning, Step Turning, Taper Turning, and Thread Cutting
Preparation of Program and Exercise on CNC Milling Machine Including Simulation: Surface Milling and Pocket Milling
Use of CAM Software for Generation of CNC Code from CAD Data
Exercises on Rapid Prototyping: 3D Printing of Simple Box, Helix Shape, and U Bracket
